name: plancraft

metadata.name: plancraft
metadata.summary: Plancraft: an evaluation dataset for planning with LLM agents

documentation:
# plancraft

[![Test](https://github.com/gautierdag/plancraft/actions/workflows/test.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/gautierdag/plancraft/actions/workflows/test.yaml)
![Python Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/python-3.9+-blue)
![Ruff](https://img.shields.io/badge/linter-ruff-blue)
[![PyPI Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/plancraft)](https://pypi.org/project/plancraft/)

Plancraft is a minecraft environment and agent that innovates on planning LLM agents with a retriever

You can install the package by running the following command:

```bash
pip install plancraft
```

Should you need the multimodal version of the package, you will also need a custom [fork](https://github.com/gautierdag/minerl.git) of the minerl package. You can install it by running the following command:

```bash
pip install git+hhttps://github.com/gautierdag/minerl.git
```

Note that you may need to follow the same installation instructions as in the [minerl documentation](https://minerl.readthedocs.io/en/latest/tutorials/index.html).

classes.name: plancraft.models.dummy.DummyModel
documentation: Dummy model returns actions that do random action

functions.name: plancraft.models.oracle.update_inventory
documentation:
decrements quantity of item in slot_from
NOTE: we don't care about incrementing the items in slot_to

classes.name: plancraft.models.oracle.OracleModel
documentation: Oracle model returns actions that solve the task optimally

functions.name: plancraft.models.utils.numpy_to_base64
documentation:
Convert a NumPy array to a base64 encoded string.

Parameters:
- img_array: np.ndarray - Input image array.
- image_format: str - The format to save the image in (e.g., "PNG", "JPEG").

Returns:
- str - Base64 encoded string of the image.

functions.name: plancraft.models.utils.get_downloaded_models
documentation: Get the list of downloaded models on the NFS partition (EIDF).

functions.name: plancraft.models.utils.tokenize
documentation: Tokenize a list of messages and start the response message

functions.name: plancraft.models.utils.convert_observation_to_message
documentation:
Convert an observation to a message format

Parameters:
- observation: dict - The observation to convert.
- objective: str - The objective of the observation.
- bbox_model: Optional - The bounding box model to use.
- oam_model: bool - Whether to use the OAM model.
- use_text_inventory: bool - Whether to use text inventory.
- use_multimodal_content_format: bool - Whether to use multimodal content format.
- use_images: bool - Whether to append an image to the message content - must be used with use_multimodal_content_format.

functions.name: plancraft.models.utils.gold_search_recipe
documentation: Gold search recipe for the given observation and action

functions.name: plancraft.models.utils.parse_content_response
documentation:
Given a message and set of valid actions, parse the content to return the action
or a message if the action is not valid/requires message response

classes.name: plancraft.models.act.ActModel
documentation: Model that does action without thinking step

functions.name: plancraft.models.get_model
documentation: Factory get model (default: ReactModel)

methods.name: plancraft.models.base.History.check_stuck
documentation:
If inventory content does not change for max_steps_no_change steps
the agent is considered stuck.

With N=10, the oracle solver can still solve 100% of the examples

classes.name: plancraft.models.base.ABCModel

methods.name: plancraft.models.base.ABCModel.step
documentation:
Model should output a valid action based on the 3 types available

Note this is a batch operation, so the model should return a list of actions
for each observation in the batch
Model class must implement the following methods to work with evaluator

functions.name: plancraft.models.bbox_model.bbox_to_slot_index_iou
documentation: Assign the given bounding box to the slot with the highest IoU.

Also returns the feature vectors of the detected boxes

functions.name: plancraft.utils.get_downloaded_models
documentation: Get the list of downloaded models on the NFS partition (EIDF).

methods.name: plancraft.models.generators.TransformersGenerator.truncate_kv_cache
documentation:
Truncate the key-value cache to the size which overlap the past_ids with the new_ids.
Uses:
    past_ids: torch.Tensor [B, T]
    new_ids: torch.Tensor [B, T]
    kv_cache: tuple[tuple[torch.Tensor]]: tuple of key-value cache tensors

NOTE: this essentially implements System Prompt in the worst case when using batch_size==1

methods.name: plancraft.models.generators.TransformersGenerator.generate_unconstrained
documentation: Generate unconstrained text based on the batch of messages.

methods.name: plancraft.models.generators.OpenAIGenerator.prepare_messages
documentation: Prepare the image messages for the model

methods.name: plancraft.models.generators.OAMGenerator.prepare_messages
documentation: Prepare the messages using a history

methods.name: plancraft.models.generators.OAMGenerator.generate_unconstrained

classes.name: plancraft.evaluator.Evaluator

methods.name: plancraft.evaluator.Evaluator.check_done
documentation: Check that target object is obtained

The evaluator class handles the environment loop and model interaction

The environment is created based on the configuration and the examples are loaded from the dataset.

variables.name: plancraft.environments.actions.SymbolicAction
documentation: | SymbolicSmeltAction

classes.name: plancraft.environments.actions.SymbolicMoveAction
documentation: "Moves an item from one slot to another

classes.name: plancraft.environments.actions.SymbolicSmeltAction
documentation: Smelts an item and moves the result into a new slot

classes.name: plancraft.environments.actions.ThinkAction
documentation: Think about the answer before answering

classes.name: plancraft.environments.actions.SearchAction
documentation: Searches for a relevant document in the wiki

classes.name: plancraft.environments.actions.StopAction
documentation:
Action that model can take to stop planning - decide impossible to continue
Note: also known as the "impossible" action

classes.name: plancraft.environments.actions.NoOp
documentation: No operation action - special instance of move

classes.name: plancraft.environments.env_real.InventoryCommandAction
documentation:
Handler which lets agents programmatically interact with an open container

Using this - agents can move a chosen quantity of items from one slot to another.

classes.name: plancraft.environments.env_real.SmeltCommandAction
documentation:
An action handler for smelting an item
We assume smelting is immediate.
@TODO: might be interesting to explore using the smelting time as an additional planning parameter.

Using this agents can smelt items in their inventory.

classes.name: plancraft.environments.env_real.InventoryObservation
documentation: Handles GUI Workbench Observations for selected items

methods.name: plancraft.environments.env_real.PlancraftBaseEnvSpec.create_actionables
documentation:
Symbolic env can move items around in the inventory using function
Real env can use camera/keyboard

functions.name: plancraft.environments.sampler.construct_example
documentation:
For a given target object, number of distractors, and impossible flag
Return a dictionary with the start inventory for the crafting task

The crafting task should be to craft the target, the inventory should contain
the resources required for the recipe to be crafted.

The number of distractors are how many random items should be added to the inventory.

If impossible is True, the target item should not be craftable with the given inventory.

functions.name: plancraft.environments.planner.optimal_planner
documentation:
Optimal planner for crafting the target item from the given inventory.

Uses depth-first search with memoization to find the shortest path of crafting steps.

Args:
    target: The target item to craft.
    inventory: The current inventory.
    steps: The current path of crafting steps.
    best_steps: The best path of crafting steps found so far.
    max_steps: The maximum number of steps to take.
    timeout: The maximum time to spend searching for a solution.

Returns:
    list of tuples of (recipe, inventory) for each step in the optimal path.

class_variables.name: plancraft.config.PlancraftConfig.max_steps
documentation: max number of steps (smelt/move) to take in the environment before stopping

class_variables.name: plancraft.config.PlancraftConfig.max_message_window

class_variables.name: plancraft.config.PlancraftConfig.use_maskrcnn

class_variables.name: plancraft.config.PlancraftConfig.use_text_inventory

class_variables.name: plancraft.config.PlancraftConfig.use_images
